prestazioni: M838TE 3.8L twin-turbo V8 engine: Full carbon-fiber intake manifold upgrade from Vorsteiner with integrated methanol-water injection (AEM 3400cc/min kit) for +80hp at 8,500 RPM while maintaining 91-octane compatibility

Garrett GTX3582R Gen II turbochargers with billet compressor wheels (64mm inducer, 82mm exducer) and TiAL MV-R 44mm external wastegates, paired with a custom McLaren-specific intercooler core from CSF Racing (5.5" thick, 1200hp-capable) and 3.5" silicone charge pipes from Vibrant Performance

Ohlins TTX40 MkII coilovers with 3-way adjustable damping (compression, rebound, and high-speed compression) and McLaren-specific spring rates (14kg/mm front, 18kg/mm rear), paired with a full spherical bearing suspension kit from SuperPro (polyurethane bushings replaced with 85D durometer spherical bearings for subframe, control arms, and anti-roll bars)
estetica: Liberty Walk LB-WORKS widebody conversion kit (570S Spider-specific, bolt-on fenders with 30mm extended wheel arches front/rear) in raw carbon fiber with integrated LED side markers and custom air curtain ducts for brake cooling

Novitec McLaren 570S Spider-specific front splitter with active aerodynamic elements (electrically adjustable dive planes) and a carbon fiber rear diffuser from 1016 Industries with integrated titanium exhaust tips (dual 4.5" outlets, T304 stainless steel)

Rohana RC10 wheels in 20"x9.5" (front) and 21"x12.5" (rear) with custom offsets (+25mm front, +35mm rear) and Michelin Pilot Sport Cup 2 R tires (255/30 R20 front, 325/25 R21 rear), finished with titanium wheel bolts from Bimecc
